43.reason: [This line incorrectly updates the level of an existing left child on every traversal. The level should only be set when the node is first created, not during traversal. This causes incorrect height values for nodes that are visited multiple times during insertion.]

62.reason: [When a duplicate value is encountered (aim == point->num), the new node is discarded without being inserted. However, according to the problem description, right child should include values >= root, so duplicates should be inserted to the right. This causes missing nodes in the BST.]
